title: dioscorea preslii
intro: Dioscorea preslii, also known as the Mexican wild yam, is a type of flowering plant in the yam family Dioscoreaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of diosgenin, a steroidal saponin. The health benefits of Dioscorea preslii include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Dioscorea preslii can be prepared as an herbal supplement, typically in capsule or tablet form, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine preparations.
